metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Three-level product brick map for the cloud-data-and-ai-platform domain.

rootGroups.name: Data Foundation
rootGroups.description: Ingest, store, transform, and govern enterprise data used for analytics and AI.

subGroups.name: Ingestion and Integration
subGroups.description: Bring operational, SaaS, streaming, and batch data into the platform.

bricks.name: Data Ingestion Fabric
bricks.description: Managed connectors, CDC, file ingestion, and streaming intake for enterprise data sources.

internalModules.description: Core services and workflows for data ingestion fabric.

interfaces.title: Data Ingestion Fabric API
interfaces.description: Programmatic and console interface for data ingestion fabric.

dataDependencies.description: Publishes audit and usage events for governance and operations.
